document_summary: Harvard-Yenching Institute official record showing Liu Dehuan as a Visiting Scholar from September 2004 to June 2005, in the field of Sociology, with university affiliation at Peking University. The record is from the Harvard-Yenching Institute's official website, located at 2 Divinity Ave., Cambridge, MA 02138.
